title: Meta-Learning Reinforcement Learning for Crypto-Return Prediction

components.name: Actor
components.function: Processes on-chain metrics, news, and sentiment to generate next-day forecasts for crypto-assets

components.name: Judge
components.function: Evaluates forecasts using a multi-objective reward vector

components.name: Meta-Judge
components.function: Refines the Judge's reward policy through preference comparisons

performance.claims: Outperforms Informer and PatchTST, outperforms traditional indicators like MACD, matches or surpasses GPT-4-based baselines

key_innovation: Triple-loop learning process where a single LLM takes on three distinct roles (Actor, Judge, Meta-Judge) for continuous self-improvement without human intervention
